questions.subject: Science
questions.prompt: The term 'TOI-1846', sometimes mentioned in the news, refers to:

options.text: A newly developed reusable launch vehicle by NASA.
A super-Earth exoplanet discovered by the Transiting Exoplanet Survey Satellite.
An Earth-observation satellite placed in a sun-synchronous orbit.
A deep-space radio telescope array used to study solar activity.

questions.explanation: TOI-1846 is a newly discovered super-Earth exoplanet found by astronomers using data from NASA's Transiting Exoplanet Survey Satellite (TESS).
questions.takeaway: NASA's TESS mission is actively discovering new exoplanets, including Super-Earths like TOI-1846.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Astronomers using data from NASA's Transiting Exoplanet Survey Satellite (TESS) have found a new super-Earth named TOI-1846.
